active_risks.description: Chronology-oriented legacy artifact names can obscure whether claims, tests, evidence, and runtime capability metadata are target scoped and independently certifiable. Active tests, SSOT rows, Tier 3 report paths, retained-boundary metadata, current document-authority projections, and runtime status values are guarded; dirty-worktree release evidence and broader legacy generator/report surfaces remain release-blocking.
active_risks.title: Legacy provenance evidence ambiguity

certification_blockers: Tier 4 independent peer validation is not complete for the retained boundary.
The peer-bundle completeness gate is not satisfied for the declared peer-profile set.
One or more supported peer profiles have incomplete or invalid preserved external evidence bundles.

The runtime validation stack now executes real app-factory, serve-check, and HTTP surface probes in the clean-room matrix, but successful execution across the supported interpreter/profile matrix is not preserved in this container.
Tigrcorn is now pinned and included in the clean-room matrix for Python 3.11/3.12, but preserved independent validation artifacts remain absent.
Validated clean-room install matrix evidence is incomplete or missing.
Validated in-scope certification lane execution evidence is incomplete or missing.
Migration upgrade → downgrade → reapply portability has not been preserved for both SQLite and PostgreSQL.
Tier 3 evidence has not yet been explicitly rebuilt from validated-run manifests.
One or more operator-visible package capabilities still lacks end-to-end verification in the current environment.
At least one claim row is still missing a machine-derived certification proof binding.
Release evidence can now be built only from a clean checkout, and the current workspace is dirty.

draft_profiles.description: Peer-supported promotion profile extending hardening for independently evidenced target claims and external profile bundle alignment.
draft_profiles.title: peer-claim

open_issues.description: Active SSOT test rows, active test sources, Tier 3 evidence report paths, retained-boundary generated bundle metadata, copied retained-boundary release-bundle paths, package runtime status values, and current document-authority projections now use capability-scoped names. Certification remains blocked until dirty-worktree release evidence is replaced by clean-checkout evidence and broader legacy generator/report surfaces are normalized or archived.
open_issues.title: Active provenance naming blocks certification

delivery_tracks.current_status: No current feature is missing claims, tests, evidence, or implementation status.
delivery_tracks.name: Registry and proof-chain closure
delivery_tracks.required_change: Keep every current feature linked to passing tests, evidence, claims, and validation output.

delivery_tracks.current_status: Current contract snapshots are generated, but release certification still depends on preserved clean-room evidence.
delivery_tracks.name: Runtime and contract closure
delivery_tracks.required_change: Keep executable OpenAPI, OpenRPC, discovery, runner, and deployment profiles aligned with generated artifacts.

delivery_tracks.current_status: Validated clean-room and lane inventories remain certification blockers.
delivery_tracks.name: Evidence inventory closure
delivery_tracks.required_change: Preserve validated-run manifests for the supported interpreter, profile, runner, and lane matrix.

delivery_tracks.name: Portability closure
delivery_tracks.required_change: Preserve upgrade, downgrade, and reapply migration evidence for SQLite and PostgreSQL.

delivery_tracks.current_status: The peer-claim profile remains draft while external bundle validation is incomplete.
delivery_tracks.name: Peer validation closure
delivery_tracks.required_change: Validate independent peer bundles for the retained supported peer-profile set.

delivery_tracks.current_status: The current worktree is dirty, so final release evidence cannot be certified from this checkout state.
delivery_tracks.name: Release certification closure
delivery_tracks.required_change: Produce final release evidence from a clean checkout and certify only after all gates pass.
